seoTitle: Goodlands vs Goomarin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goodlands and Goomarin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goodlands and Goomarin.
heading: Goodlands vs Goomarin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goodlands, Western Australia and Goomarin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goodlands has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Goomarin (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goodlands or Goomarin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goodlands has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Goomarin scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goodlands scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Goomarin scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goodlands or Goomarin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goodlands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
